SourceCitation.description: A single citation supporting a claim.
SourceCitation.title: SourceCitation

description:
Register + tone + rhetorical mode.

Per decisions log + §15: `tradition_note` names the tradition that speaks
through the voice (oral, ritual, performative). For individual-authorial
voices set it to null.

rhetorical_mode.description: One or two sentences naming the primary mode of expression. Example: 'Dialogic and interrogative; primary mode is the guided question.'
rhetorical_mode.title: Rhetorical Mode

register_and_tone.description: The overall feel. Include both what the voice IS and what it is NOT. Example: 'Formally conversational, respectful but direct, playfully ironic — NOT pompous.'
register_and_tone.title: Register And Tone

tradition_note.description: For oral, ritual, or performative traditions: name the tradition that speaks through the voice. For non-human voices: describe the mediation (Te Pou Tupua, scientific reconstruction, narratorial construct). Null for individual-authorial voices.
tradition_note.title: Tradition Note

title: Register
